Group and root sentinels decorate the tree: the root gains usage, version,
Long, flags, and examples; a group decorates its bare node with metadata
and inheritable flags; commands bind inherited flags through the shared
handles and carry usage/alias/hidden of their own.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import (
	"fmt"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
)

// The demo application.
//
// Manages the database and its jobs.
//
//fabrik:cli:root version=1.2.3 usage="app <command>"
//fabrik:cli:flag name=verbose type=bool help="Verbose output."
//fabrik:cli:example cmd="app database migrate" help="Apply migrations."
var _root struct{}

// Database maintenance commands.
//
// Every subcommand talks to the configured database.
//
//fabrik:cli:group name=database alias=db usage="app database <command>"
//fabrik:cli:flag name=timeout type=int default=30 help="Query timeout in seconds."
//fabrik:cli:example cmd="app db migrate" help="Via the alias."
var _database struct{}

// Apply pending migrations.
//
//fabrik:cli:command path="database migrate" alias=m
func Migrate(ctx cli.Context, timeout int, verbose bool) error {
	_, err := fmt.Fprintln(ctx.Stdout(), timeout, verbose)
	return err
}

// Rebuild the search index.
//
//fabrik:cli:command usage="app reindex [flags]" hidden=true
func Reindex(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	rootVerbose := cli.BoolFlag("verbose").Help("Verbose output.")
	databaseTimeout := cli.IntFlag("timeout").Default(30).Help("Query timeout in seconds.")

	root := &cli.Command{
		Name:    "app",
		Usage:   "app <command>",
		Version: "1.2.3",
		Long:    "The demo application.\n\nManages the database and its jobs.",
		Flags:   cli.Flags(rootVerbose),
		Examples: []cli.Example{
			{Cmd: "app database migrate", Help: "Apply migrations."},
		},
		Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
			{
				Name:    "database",
				Help:    "Database maintenance commands",
				Long:    "Every subcommand talks to the configured database.",
				Usage:   "app database <command>",
				Aliases: []string{"db"},
				Flags:   cli.Flags(databaseTimeout),
				Examples: []cli.Example{
					{Cmd: "app db migrate", Help: "Via the alias."},
				},
				Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
					{
						Name:    "migrate",
						Help:    "Apply pending migrations",
						Aliases: []string{"m"},
						Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
							return shared.Migrate(ctx, databaseTimeout.Get(ctx), rootVerbose.Get(ctx))
						},
					},
				},
			},
			{
				Name:   "reindex",
				Help:   "Rebuild the search index",
				Usage:  "app reindex [flags]",
				Hidden: true,
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					return shared.Reindex(ctx)
				},
			},
		},
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}
